goal: DNA Editor command+K shortcuts. Integrates with 42.2-43's command+K global search to add gene-lifecycle shortcuts: typing "try <ref>" triggers the same flow as the Try button; "promote <slug>" runs evolution promote; "shed <slug>" runs evolution shed; "preview <slug>" loads the trial artifact into the iframe. Autocompletes slug names from the current DNA Editor's enumerated genes. Depends on 44.5-13 (action wiring) and 42.2-43 (command+K infrastructure). Per decision gad-198.
